changes: Upgraded to .NET 10 with Central Package Management for all NuGet dependencies
Migrated from Avalonia.ReactiveUI to ReactiveUI.Avalonia with source generators replacing Fody IL weaving
Cover images are now stored at 2x resolution for sharper display on high-DPI screens
Added version changelog popup that shows once per update with what's new
Added Refresh Series button in settings to mass refresh series data and covers with a searchable picker
Added Refresh Covers toggle in Preferences to re-download covers when refreshing individual series
Added glassmorphism transparent blur effect with a toggle in settings
Added advanced filter builder with chip-based UI for combining multiple search criteria
Added collection stats pie charts for format, demographic, and status distributions
Added splash screen with loading progress during startup
Added Value and Volume Count sort options for the collection
Added dynamic publisher filter that populates from your collection
Expanded currency options to 30+ with proper locale formatting
Added API health check that monitors AniList and MangaDex every 10 minutes and disables features when unavailable
Added user data backup file saved automatically on close
Added toast notification when a series is successfully added
Added multilingual font support for Japanese, Korean, Chinese, Arabic, Thai, and more
AniList API now retries on server errors (HTTP 500) instead of silently failing
Series cards now fade in smoothly on initial load
Added What's New button in settings to review the changelog anytime
actions: Refresh existing series via settings to get higher quality cover images
Re-upload custom covers for sharper display on high-DPI screens
Check settings to enable the glassmorphism blur effect if desired

changes: Fixed series refresh failing for AniList-sourced series whose URLs contain a title slug
Fixed MangaDex cover images not downloading when the API returns cover data as an array
Fixed What's New page showing double 'v' in the version and missing changelog content in MSIX builds
What's New dialog now opens over the settings window instead of closing it
Fixed misleading 'Refresh Covers on Startup' label to clarify it applies to individual series refreshes
What's New dialog now has navigation arrows to browse changelogs from previous versions
actions: Refresh all series via settings to fix any missing cover images

changes: Additional language selections now persist across app restarts
When MangaDex is missing a title in a requested language, a popup lets you enter it manually
Add Series button now shows a spinning loading indicator with the series name while fetching data
Added series notification now displays the title in your preferred language instead of the AniList ID
User data loading is now async so the splash screen stays responsive during startup
Series card +/- and edit buttons now update correctly when switching themes
Improved collection filtering and sorting performance for large libraries
Reduced popup dialog text size for better readability
